publicLabel: Dato ufficiale ISTAT per sezione censuaria

sourceDataset.geometries: Basi territoriali 2021 - Calabria, sezioni di censimento
sourceDataset.variables: Dati per sezioni di censimento - Censimento permanente della popolazione e delle abitazioni 2023

verificationStatus: official ISTAT GeoJSON produced; population indicator validated from field P1 for 246 sections out of 317 Lamezia census-section geometries
frontendStatus: public Atlante page can load the processed GeoJSON; explicit demo fallback remains for development or missing data
publicMapRole: primary census-section base for Atlante territoriale
knownLimits: Raw ISTAT ZIPs are intentionally not committed because they are reproducible and heavy.
The web-ready processed GeoJSON is intentionally committed because it is about 0.2 MiB.
The public geometry is generalized for browser delivery; raw ISTAT files remain the source of full-detail geometry.
The 2023 variables join covers 246 sections out of 317 Lamezia census-section geometries; the remaining 71 geometries keep null indicator values.
Null indicator values are preserved as null and are separate from 22 sections where P1 is a true zero.
Fictitious sections 888888x and 999999x are excluded by default or reported separately.
Only the population indicator mapped from ISTAT field P1 is enabled; other indicator families remain in preparation.
This layer must not be confused with Zornade cadastral urban sections.
warning: Non confondere con sezioni urbane catastali; non usare layer catastali per indicatori censuari ISTAT
